title: colutea nepalensis
intro: Colutea nepalensis, also known as the Nepal horse shoe or Nepal velvet bean, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Colutea nepalensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and powdering the leaves or seeds, which can be used as a tea or added to other herbal remedies.
